14: This is the first mention of a future restoration in the book of Ezekiel. God makes four specific promises to the remnant: 1. To gather them (9:17a) 2. To restore them to the Land (9:17b) 3. To cleanse the Land of abominations (9:18a) 4. To initiate a new covenant with them (9:19; see also Jeremiah 31:31-34) - This new covenant would consist of two parts: a. A change of heart b. The outpouring of His Spirit
